_note: Held-out regression canary for guideline self-evolution — a fixed set of central, stable pages per content type. Consumed by the SoT self-evolution workflow (editor-in-chief.md step 6) acceptance rule: a guideline change is adopted only if this set's lint and Desk scores do not regress before vs. after. Human-curated; no automatic Claude edits — never used as a revision target so the proposer cannot game the comparison set (held-out). This fixed set is the longitudinal-reproduction core; each validation cycle supplements it with a fresh, audit-logged sample of stable pages of the edit type·already-treated defects of the same mechanism (frozen-set rot prevention) — the fresh samples live only in the transition record and are not appended to this file (preserving its fixedness). Paths are relative to wiki/. Types that ship empty in this corpus (timeline, trail) hold empty lists until the operator curates pages of that type.
